query:
SELECT g.id, g.gameDate, g.awayTeam, g.homeTeam, 
       g.awayBookSpread, g.homeBookSpread, g.bookTotal,
       g.awayModelSpread, g.homeModelSpread, g.modelTotal,
       g.modelAwayML, g.modelHomeML
FROM games g
WHERE g.gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND g.sport = 'NBA'
ORDER BY g.sortOrder ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

       g.modelAwayML, g.modelHomeML
FROM games g

ORDER BY g.sortOrder ASC;
